title: pachyrhizus vernalis var. integrifolius
intro: Pachyrhizus vernalis var. integrifolius, also known as the "Chinese arrowroot," is a plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae, characterized by its edible taproot and medicinal properties. The taproot of this plant contains a compound called amygdalin, which releases benzaldehyde and hydrogen cyanide, but when prepared correctly, it can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and inflammation. The medicinal properties of Pachyrhizus vernalis var. integrifolius include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are used to make teas and soups that can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
